feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Entretien avec Seyni Ndiaye Fall, Coordonnateur du Système d’Information et de Management du MEN

link.title: Entretien avec Seyni Ndiaye Fall, Coordonnateur du Système d’Information et de Management du MEN

entry.content:
Dans cet entretien, Seyni Ndiaye FALL, coordonnateur du Sytème d’information et de management du Ministère de l’Education nationale (SIMEN) revient sur l’ensemble des dispositifs mis en place dans le cadre du confinement pour assurer la continuité des enseignements apprentissages.
En plus, monsieur FALL, soutient que le SIEMN accompagne tous les services et directions du ministère dans le processus de digitalisation.
entry.summary: Dans cet entretien, Seyni Ndiaye FALL, coordonnateur du Sytème d’information et de management du Ministère de l’Education nationale (SIMEN) revient sur l’ensemble des dispositifs mis en place dans le cadre du confinement pour assurer la continuité des enseignements apprentissages. En plus, monsieur FALL, soutient que le SIEMN accompagne tous les services et directions du ministère dans le processus de digitalisation.

entry.title: Can Sony’s new noise-cancelling WH-1000XM4 headphones really block out all noise?

link.title: Can Sony’s new noise-cancelling WH-1000XM4 headphones really block out all noise?

entry.content:
"We’re shaking things up a little for Unwrapped!”
Sony’s noise-cancelling headphones have always been considered as one of the best ones you can buy in the market… but just how good are they, really?
We push the WH-1000XM4’s Active Noise Cancellation to the limits through a series of very loud tests (including destroying a nice dinner plate). Watch to find out what went down!
Sony WH-1000XM4 ($549):
entry.summary: "We’re shaking things up a little for Unwrapped!” Sony’s noise-cancelling headphones have always been considered as one of the best ones you can buy in the market… but just how good are they, really? We push the WH-1000XM4’s Active Noise Cancellation to the limits through a series of very loud tests (including destroying a nice dinner plate). Watch to find out what went down! Sony WH-1000XM4 ($549):

entry.title: Principles of Gandhi important for saving Constitution: CM Ashok Gehlot

link.title: Principles of Gandhi important for saving Constitution: CM Ashok Gehlot

entry.content:
Chief Minister of Rajasthan, Ashok Gehlot, said that the objective of programs organised to commemorate the 150th birth anniversary of Mahatma Gandhi is to associate a large number of common people with these events to spread the message of truth, non-violence and peace to the new generation.
The CM was presiding over the meeting of the Department of Arts, Literature, Culture and Archeology regarding the 150th birth anniversary programs of Mahatma Gandhi.
CM Gehlot stressed that to protect the Constitution, the atmosphere should be maintained by propagating the principles of Mahatma Gandhi.
During the meeting, the Chief Minister said that we will have to bring Mahatma Gandhi’s ideas to the people by bringing more and more people, thinkers, experts and institutions together. It would not be enough to organise only a few seminars or events, so the Jubilee year programs have been extended for one year, so that such events can go on continuously.
He said that in view of the COVID-19 pandemic, such programs should be conducted on monthly and fortnightly intervals through webinars and participation of maximum people should be ensured in them.
He also instructed the concerned officers to prepare for organising a global conclave on Mahatma Gandhi through video conference.
entry.summary: Chief Minister of Rajasthan, Ashok Gehlot, said that the objective of programs organised to commemorate the 150th birth anniversary of Mahatma Gandhi is to associate a large number of common people with these events to spread the message of truth, non-violence and peace to the new generation. The CM was presiding over the meeting of the Department of Arts, Literature, Culture and Archeology regarding the 150th birth anniversary programs of Mahatma Gandhi. CM Gehlot stressed that to protect the Constitution, the atmosphere should be maintained by propagating the principles of Mahatma Gandhi. During the meeting, the Chief Minister said that we will have to bring Mahatma Gandhi’s ideas to the people by bringing more and more people, thinkers, experts and institutions together. It would not be enough to organise only a few seminars or events, so the Jubilee year programs have been extended for one year, so that such events can go on continuously. He said that in view of the COVID-19 pandemic, such programs should be conducted on monthly and fortnightly intervals through webinars and participation of maximum people should be ensured in them. He also instructed the concerned officers to prepare for organising a global conclave on Mahatma Gandhi through video conference.

entry.title: ಜಸ್ಟ್ 1800 ರುಪಾಯಿ ಸಾಲ ತೀರಿಸಿಲ್ವಾ Dhoni Oneindia Kannada

link.title: ಜಸ್ಟ್ 1800 ರುಪಾಯಿ ಸಾಲ ತೀರಿಸಿಲ್ವಾ Dhoni Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ವರ್ಷದಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು ಬಾರಿಯಾದರೂ ಅಧಿವೇಶನ ನಡೆಬೇಕೆಂಬ ಉತ್ತರ ಕರ್ನಾಟಕ ರೈತರ ಕೂಗು ಇದೆ. ಸರಕಾರ ವಿವಿಧ ಕಾರಣಾತರಗಳಿಂದ ರಾಜದಾನಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಅಧಿವೇಶನ ನಡೆಸಲಾಗುತ್ತಿದೆ
#MSDhoni
As the news of Aunt Dhoni’s debt was reported in the media, his fans sparked out against the JSCA, with fans paying off a debt of Rs 1,800 in Dhoni’s name
entry.summary: ವರ್ಷದಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು ಬಾರಿಯಾದರೂ ಅಧಿವೇಶನ ನಡೆಬೇಕೆಂಬ ಉತ್ತರ ಕರ್ನಾಟಕ ರೈತರ ಕೂಗು ಇದೆ. ಸರಕಾರ ವಿವಿಧ ಕಾರಣಾತರಗಳಿಂದ ರಾಜದಾನಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಅಧಿವೇಶನ ನಡೆಸಲಾಗುತ್ತಿದೆ #MSDhoni As the news of Aunt Dhoni’s debt was reported in the media, his fans sparked out against the JSCA, with fans paying off a debt of Rs 1,800 in Dhoni’s name

entry.title: Booba - Party - Cartoon for kids

link.title: Booba - Party - Cartoon for kids

entry.content:
SUBSCRIBE: – Kedoo Animations is the place of the most amazing short animations & toons from studios worldwide!
Booba appears in a room, which is prepared for a children’s party. His gets attracted by a red balloon and tries to grab it, but it’s not as simple as it seems at first glance.

entry.title: ஈ பாஸ் ரத்து எதிரொலி வாகனங்களால் நிரம்பி வழிந்த பூந்தமல்லி பெங்களூர் தேசிய நெடுஞ்சாலை - வீடியோ

link.title: ஈ பாஸ் ரத்து எதிரொலி வாகனங்களால் நிரம்பி வழிந்த பூந்தமல்லி பெங்களூர் தேசிய நெடுஞ்சாலை - வீடியோ

entry.content:
சென்னை: தமிழகத்தில் மாவட்டம் விட்டு மாவட்டம் செல்வதற்கான இ பாஸ் இன்று முதல் ரத்து செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. இதனால் வாகன ஓட்டிகள் மகிழ்ச்சி அடைந்துள்ளார்கள்.
E Pass procedure cancelled from Today in Tamilnadu. Motorists welcomes this announcement.
entry.summary: சென்னை: தமிழகத்தில் மாவட்டம் விட்டு மாவட்டம் செல்வதற்கான இ பாஸ் இன்று முதல் ரத்து செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. இதனால் வாகன ஓட்டிகள் மகிழ்ச்சி அடைந்துள்ளார்கள். E Pass procedure cancelled from Today in Tamilnadu. Motorists welcomes this announcement.

entry.title: Police investigating two viral videos of children driving lorry, car in Negri Sembilan

link.title: Police investigating two viral videos of children driving lorry, car in Negri Sembilan

entry.content:
Police are investigating two viral videos depicting two boys driving a vehicle in two separate incidents in Negri Sembilan in accordance with the Children Act 2001.
The first viral video showed a Standard Three pupil driving a car along a village road in Rembau, while another showed a 12-year-old boy parking a tanker lorry in Rantau.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: Police are investigating two viral videos depicting two boys driving a vehicle in two separate incidents in Negri Sembilan in accordance with the Children Act 2001. The first viral video showed a Standard Three pupil driving a car along a village road in Rembau, while another showed a 12-year-old boy parking a tanker lorry in Rantau. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput ने मौत से पहले क्यों गूगल पर सर्च था Disha Salian का नाम ? FilmiBeat

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput ने मौत से पहले क्यों गूगल पर सर्च था Disha Salian का नाम ? FilmiBeat

entry.content:
Sushant Singh Rajput searched Disha Salian name on google before his death. Watch Video to know more !!!
#SushantSinghRajput #DishaSalian #RheaArrest
entry.summary: Sushant Singh Rajput searched Disha Salian name on google before his death. Watch Video to know more !!! #SushantSinghRajput #DishaSalian #RheaArrest

entry.title: Kangana Ranaut Karan Johar, Aditya Chopra, Mahesh Bhatt ‘killed Sushant’

link.title: Kangana Ranaut Karan Johar, Aditya Chopra, Mahesh Bhatt ‘killed Sushant’

entry.content:
In an explosive allegation, Bollywood actress Kangana Ranaut named filmmakers Karan Johar, Aditya Chopra and Mahesh Bhatt, besides a senior journalist, as people responsible for killing Sushant Singh Rajput by bullying, exploiting and harassing the late actor.
#KanganaRanaut #Karanjohar
entry.summary: In an explosive allegation, Bollywood actress Kangana Ranaut named filmmakers Karan Johar, Aditya Chopra and Mahesh Bhatt, besides a senior journalist, as people responsible for killing Sushant Singh Rajput by bullying, exploiting and harassing the late actor. #KanganaRanaut #Karanjohar

entry.title: Actress Ekaterina Koltunova Red Carpet Fashion Look #1

link.title: Actress Ekaterina Koltunova Red Carpet Fashion Look #1

entry.content: Broll footage: Actress and model Ekaterina Koltunova @ispanola red carpet fashion look #1 at MaximoTV’s studios media day in Los Angeles, California USA on September 5, 2020   "This video is available for editorial licensing, broadcast tv, all media and worldwide use"   ©MaximoTV
entry.summary: Broll footage: Actress and model Ekaterina Koltunova @ispanola red carpet fashion look #1 at MaximoTV’s studios media day in Los Angeles, California USA on September 5, 2020 "This video is available for editorial licensing, broadcast tv, all media and worldwide use" ©MaximoTV

entry.title: Menteri Agama Dicecar Anggota DPR Komisi VIII Karena Pernyataan Kontroversial

link.title: Menteri Agama Dicecar Anggota DPR Komisi VIII Karena Pernyataan Kontroversial

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Pernyataan Menteri Agama Fachrul Razi dalam sebuah diskusi menuai kontroversi. Hadir dalam acara peluncuran aplikasi ASN No Radikal yang digelar Kementerian Pendayagunaan Aparatur Negara dan Reformasi Birokrasi, Menteri Agama menyinggung soal tampilan menarik atau good looking seseorang yang dikirim untuk menyebarkan radikalisme.
Anggota Komisi VIII DPR RI mencecar Menteri Agama soal pernyataannya yang menyebut adanya penyusup radikalisme dengan tampilan good looking.
Menurut anggota Komisi VIII Ali Taher Parasong, sebagai Menteri Agama, Fachrul Razi seharusnya tidak mengeluarkan pendapat yang bisa menimbulkan polemik.
Terkait pernyataan di acara diskusi Kemenpan RB soal good looking radikalisme, Fachrul Razi menjelaskan kepada Komisi VIII bahwa dirinya tak mengetahui jika acara yang dihadiri terbuka untuk publik.
Sepengetahuan Menteri Agama, saat itu apa yang ia sampaikan hanya diperuntukkan bagi kalangan ASN secara internal.
Upaya mencegah faham radikalisme memang patut dilakukan oleh banyak pihak termasuk di lingkungan Aparatur Sipil Negara.
Kementerian Agama tentu punya peranan penting bersama Kementerian lain, dengan mengedepankan penyampaian informasi tanpa munculkan polemik di tengah masyarakat.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Pernyataan Menteri Agama Fachrul Razi dalam sebuah diskusi menuai kontroversi. Hadir dalam acara peluncuran aplikasi ASN No Radikal yang digelar Kementerian Pendayagunaan Aparatur Negara dan Reformasi Birokrasi, Menteri Agama menyinggung soal tampilan menarik atau good looking seseorang yang dikirim untuk menyebarkan radikalisme. Anggota Komisi VIII DPR RI mencecar Menteri Agama soal pernyataannya yang menyebut adanya penyusup radikalisme dengan tampilan good looking. Menurut anggota Komisi VIII Ali Taher Parasong, sebagai Menteri Agama, Fachrul Razi seharusnya tidak mengeluarkan pendapat yang bisa menimbulkan polemik. Terkait pernyataan di acara diskusi Kemenpan RB soal good looking radikalisme, Fachrul Razi menjelaskan kepada Komisi VIII bahwa dirinya tak mengetahui jika acara yang dihadiri terbuka untuk publik. Sepengetahuan Menteri Agama, saat itu apa yang ia sampaikan hanya diperuntukkan bagi kalangan ASN secara internal. Upaya mencegah faham radikalisme memang patut dilakukan oleh banyak pihak termasuk di lingkungan Aparatur Sipil Negara. Kementerian Agama tentu punya peranan penting bersama Kementerian lain, dengan mengedepankan penyampaian informasi tanpa munculkan polemik di tengah masyarakat.

entry.title: ‘Kalau semua yang ada kes SPRM dilarang masuk, Najib pun tak boleh masuk’

link.title: ‘Kalau semua yang ada kes SPRM dilarang masuk, Najib pun tak boleh masuk’

entry.content:
Ketua Menteri Sabah, Shafie Apdal menegaskan kepada kerajaan persekutuan bahawa sebarang isu imigresen melibatkan negeri itu adalah di bawah kuasa kerajaan negeri yang dijamin Perlembagaan Persekutuan.
Menurutnya, sekiranya semua individu yang sedang disiasat kes rasuah oleh Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia (SPRM) dilarang masuk ke Sabah, larangan itu juga harus terpakai kepada bekas perdana menteri Najib Razak dan pemimpin politik lain.
Sumber visual:
entry.summary: Ketua Menteri Sabah, Shafie Apdal menegaskan kepada kerajaan persekutuan bahawa sebarang isu imigresen melibatkan negeri itu adalah di bawah kuasa kerajaan negeri yang dijamin Perlembagaan Persekutuan. Menurutnya, sekiranya semua individu yang sedang disiasat kes rasuah oleh Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia (SPRM) dilarang masuk ke Sabah, larangan itu juga harus terpakai kepada bekas perdana menteri Najib Razak dan pemimpin politik lain. Sumber visual:

entry.title: Salles ou streaming, le cinéma du ‘monde d’après’ sera-t-il vraiment différent?

link.title: Salles ou streaming, le cinéma du ‘monde d’après’ sera-t-il vraiment différent?

entry.content: Au festival de film américain de Deauville 2020, on a interrogé les acteurs du monde du cinéma sur la place du streaming à l’ère post-Covid.
entry.summary: Au festival de film américain de Deauville 2020, on a interrogé les acteurs du monde du cinéma sur la place du streaming à l’ère post-Covid.

entry.title: Lux Aeterna (Gaspar Noé) - Bande-annonce

link.title: Lux Aeterna (Gaspar Noé) - Bande-annonce

entry.content: Charlotte Gainsbourg accepte de jouer une sorcière jetée au bûcher dans le premier film réalisé par Beatrice Dalle. Or l’organisation anarchique, les problèmes techniques et les dérapages psychotiques plongent peu à peu le tournage dans un chaos de pure lumière.
entry.summary: Charlotte Gainsbourg accepte de jouer une sorcière jetée au bûcher dans le premier film réalisé par Beatrice Dalle. Or l’organisation anarchique, les problèmes techniques et les dérapages psychotiques plongent peu à peu le tournage dans un chaos de pure lumière.

entry.title: Biden talks to Jacob Blake, hears from Kenoshans

link.title: Biden talks to Jacob Blake, hears from Kenoshans

entry.content:
Biden talks to Jacob Blake, hears from Kenoshans
Democratic presidential nominee Joe Biden met with the residents of strife-torn Kenosha, Wisconsin, and spoke by phone with Jacob Blake, the Black man shot there by police.
Reuters brings you the latest business, finance and breaking news video from around the globe. Our reputation for accuracy and impartiality is unparalleled.
entry.summary: Biden talks to Jacob Blake, hears from Kenoshans Democratic presidential nominee Joe Biden met with the residents of strife-torn Kenosha, Wisconsin, and spoke by phone with Jacob Blake, the Black man shot there by police. Reuters brings you the latest business, finance and breaking news video from around the globe. Our reputation for accuracy and impartiality is unparalleled.

entry.title: Novas camisas 3 de alguns gigantes europeus são reveladas

link.title: Novas camisas 3 de alguns gigantes europeus são reveladas

entry.content: O site "Todo Sobre Camisetas" vazou as novas camisas 3 de diversos clubes europeus vestidos pela Nike. Os uniformes serão lançados nas próximas semanas
entry.summary: O site "Todo Sobre Camisetas" vazou as novas camisas 3 de diversos clubes europeus vestidos pela Nike. Os uniformes serão lançados nas próximas semanas

entry.title: Entre Jean Paul II et Mère Teresa, une longue histoire d’amitié

link.title: Entre Jean Paul II et Mère Teresa, une longue histoire d’amitié

entry.content: Mère Teresa était très proche du pape Jean Paul II, dont elle était l’aînée de dix ans. Une grande affection ainsi qu’une sincère compréhension les unissaient. En 1986, c’est la religieuse fondatrice des Missionnaires de la charité qui accueillait le pontife polonais lors de son premier voyage en Inde. En 2003, c’est lui qui l’a proclamée bienheureuse.
entry.summary: Mère Teresa était très proche du pape Jean Paul II, dont elle était l’aînée de dix ans. Une grande affection ainsi qu’une sincère compréhension les unissaient. En 1986, c’est la religieuse fondatrice des Missionnaires de la charité qui accueillait le pontife polonais lors de son premier voyage en Inde. En 2003, c’est lui qui l’a proclamée bienheureuse.

entry.title: Amical OM - Nîmes (2-2) : les buts de Lopez et Rongier

link.title: Amical OM - Nîmes (2-2) : les buts de Lopez et Rongier

entry.content: Les buts olympiens marqués par Maxime Lopez (5e) et Valentin Rongier (8e) lors du match amical face à Nîmes (2-2) joué au centre Robert Louis-Dreyfus.
entry.summary: Les buts olympiens marqués par Maxime Lopez (5e) et Valentin Rongier (8e) lors du match amical face à Nîmes (2-2) joué au centre Robert Louis-Dreyfus.

entry.title: Medical apathy seen in Noida as dead bodies kept in open due to inadequate facilities at mortuary

link.title: Medical apathy seen in Noida as dead bodies kept in open due to inadequate facilities at mortuary

entry.content:
A situation highlighting the lack of basic infrastructure at a hospital in Noida came into light.
The bodies were kept in the open on the floor in Noida hospital mortuary.
The old deep freezers were no longer in use and the new ones kept in the hospital premises had not been installed yet. Locals face problems due to inadequate facilities at the hospitals.
entry.summary: A situation highlighting the lack of basic infrastructure at a hospital in Noida came into light. The bodies were kept in the open on the floor in Noida hospital mortuary. The old deep freezers were no longer in use and the new ones kept in the hospital premises had not been installed yet. Locals face problems due to inadequate facilities at the hospitals.

entry.title: Trump May Attempt To Use An Early Coronavirus Vaccine To Boost Election

link.title: Trump May Attempt To Use An Early Coronavirus Vaccine To Boost Election

entry.content:
Ever since the COVID-19 pandemic made its way to the United States, one huge question looms:
Whether or not Americans would accept a potential vaccine has lingered over everything.
First, there was the concern that the anti-vaxxer movement might dissuade people.
More recently, the worry has been that Trump would rush out an unproven vaccine.
It would be an obvious attempt to earn an election bump in November, says Gizmodo.
However, pharmaceutical giants seem to think the world could use some reassurance.
entry.summary: Ever since the COVID-19 pandemic made its way to the United States, one huge question looms: Whether or not Americans would accept a potential vaccine has lingered over everything. First, there was the concern that the anti-vaxxer movement might dissuade people. More recently, the worry has been that Trump would rush out an unproven vaccine. It would be an obvious attempt to earn an election bump in November, says Gizmodo. However, pharmaceutical giants seem to think the world could use some reassurance.
